title: Malleola steffensii
taxonomy: Malleola steffensii is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Malleola and is a flowering plant. Malleola steffensii is native to the tropical regions of Asia, specifically in Southeast Asia. It is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on land, and is typically found in shaded and humid environments. The classification of Malleola steffensii is further broken down into the family Tungaceae, subfamily Spiranthoideae, tribe Mallearieae, and subtribe Malleolinae.
